outputs.description: The cookie for the results Autofocus.Samples.id The ID of the sample.
outputs.name: Autofocus.Cookie

outputs.description: The MD5 hash of the sample. Autofocus.Samples.sha1 The SHA-1 of the sample.
outputs.name: Autofocus.Samples.md5

outputs.description: The SHA-256 of the sample. Autofocus.Samples.app_name The application name (if exists).
outputs.name: Autofocus.Samples.sha256

outputs.description: The size of the sample. Autofocus.Samples.ssdeep The SSDeep of the sample.
outputs.name: Autofocus.Samples.size

outputs.description: The create date for the sample. Autofocus.Samples.finish_date The finish date for the sample.
outputs.name: Autofocus.Samples.create_date

outputs.description: Is this malware (0 or 1). Autofocus.Samples.app_packagename The sample package name (if exists).
outputs.name: Autofocus.Samples.malware

outputs.description: The sample type. Autofocus.Samples.region Where this sample was seen.
outputs.name: Autofocus.Samples.filetype
